author: Writings in Connection with the Donatist Controversy

classification.cautionReason: This work discusses heresy in order to refute it; do not classify it as heretical merely from its title.

originalBook: In which the remaining judgments of the Council of Carthage are examined.
title: Chapter 35

source.title: NPNF1-04. Augustine: The Writings Against the Manichaeans and Against the Donatists

verses.text: Pudentianus of Cuiculi said: "My recent ordination to the episcopate induced me, brethren, to wait and hear what my elders would decide.
For it is plain that heresies have and can have nothing; and so, if any come from them, it is determined righteously that they should be baptized."
As, therefore, we have already answered those who went before, for whose judgment this man was waiting, so be it understood that we have answered himself.
